**Evaluating strike announcement**

It seems this is announcing an upcoming national strike, specifically on November 17 from 9 AM to 1 PM, even though Trenord is not involved. Based on the guidelines, I need to determine if "isStrike" should be set to true. Since this document is indeed an announcement of a new strike, I'll set "isStrike" to true. Now, I need to extract the start and end times for the strike as well.
